---
title: "TMP_ICP"
author: "Ashleigh Montgomery"
date: "2026-04-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#Set working directory
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ashmo/OneDrive - Arizona State University/Data/TEMPEST/Porewater/02_CleanMicroplateData")

library(googlesheets4)
library(googledrive)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(plater)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
```



```{r}
cal_curve<-function(Conc_uM,ABS){
    model<-lm(ABS~Conc_uM)
    slope<-coef(model)[[2]]
    intercept<-coef(model)[[1]]
     R2<-summary(model)$adj.r.squared
  return(data.frame(slope=slope,intercept=intercept,R2=R2))
}


#function to calculate percent difference
calc_percent_diff<-function(dup,original){
  avg<-(dup+original)/2
  percent_diff<-((abs(original-dup))/avg)*100
  return(percent_diff=percent_diff)
}
```



**Run 1 - April 17, 2026**
```{r}

stds1<-read.csv("TMP_ICP_20260417_Stds.csv")%>%
  separate_wider_delim(Sample.Id,names = c("Curve","Expected_Conc_ppm"),delim = " ",
                       too_many = "merge")%>%
  mutate(Expected_Conc_ppm = if_else(str_detect(Expected_Conc_ppm,"Blank"),0,as.numeric(Expected_Conc_ppm)))

stds1


```


```{r}
#metals
metals1<-stds1%>%
   filter(Curve == "M" | Curve =="Calib")%>%
  select(Curve,Expected_Conc_ppm,
         Al.axial..cps.,
         B.axial..cps.,B.radial..cps.,
         Ba.radial..cps.,
         Ca.radial..cps.,
         Fe.radial..cps.,Fe.axial..cps.,
         K.radial..cps.,
         Mg.radial..cps.,
         Mn.axial..cps.,
         Na.radial..cps.,
         Zn.radial..cps.)%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = contains(".cps."),
    names_to = "Element",
    values_to = "cps",
    values_drop_na = TRUE)

metals1


#CALCULATE R2  
metals1.curve<-metals1%>%
  group_by(Element)%>%
  summarise(cal_curve(Expected_Conc_ppm,cps))

metals1.curve

dat.text<-data.frame(Element = c("Al.axial..cps.",
                                 "B.axial..cps.",
                                 "B.radial..cps.",
                                 "Ba.radial..cps.",
                                 "Ca.radial..cps.",
                                 "Fe.axial..cps.","Fe.radial..cps.",
         "K.radial..cps.",
         "Mg.radial..cps.",
         "Mn.axial..cps.",
         "Na.radial..cps.",
         "Zn.radial..cps."),
         label = c(as.character(round(metals1.curve[1,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[2,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[3,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[4,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[5,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[6,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[7,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[8,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[9,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[10,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[11,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(metals1.curve[12,4],digits = 4))),
         x=c(80,80,80,80,80,80,80,80,80,80,80,80),
         y=c(4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000,4000000))

dat.text 




#PLOT CURVES
metals1.curve.plots<-metals1%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Expected_Conc_ppm,y=cps))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE)+
  facet_wrap(~Element)+
  geom_text(data = dat.text,
            mapping = aes(x = x,
                          y = y,
                          label = label),
            col = "black",
            size = 3,
            fontface="bold")
  

metals1.curve.plots




```




#P, S, and Si 
```{r}
P1<-stds1%>%
   filter(Curve == "P" | Curve =="Calib")%>%
  select(Curve,Expected_Conc_ppm,
         P.178.221..cps.,P.213.617..cps.,
         S.axial..cps.,S.radial..cps.,
         Si.axial..cps.)%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = contains(".cps."),
    names_to = "Element",
    values_to = "cps",
    values_drop_na = TRUE)

P1


#CALCULATE R2  
P1.curve<-P1%>%
  group_by(Element)%>%
  summarise(cal_curve(Expected_Conc_ppm,cps))

P1.curve



#labels for plot
dat.textp1<-data.frame(Element = c("P.178.221..cps.","P.213.617..cps.",
         "S.axial..cps.","S.radial..cps.",
         "Si.axial..cps."),
         label = c(as.character(round(P1.curve[1,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(P1.curve[2,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(P1.curve[3,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(P1.curve[4,4],digits = 4)),
                   as.character(round(P1.curve[5,4],digits = 4))),
         x=c(55,55,55,55,55),
         y=c(300,150000,12000,800,1230000))

dat.textp1 




#PLOT CURVES
P1.curve.plots<-P1%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Expected_Conc_ppm,y=cps))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE)+
  facet_wrap(~Element,scales="free_y")+
  geom_text(data = dat.textp1,
            mapping = aes(x = x,
                          y = y,
                          label = label),
            col = "black",
            size = 3,
            fontface="bold")
  

P1.curve.plots




```
